source_text.text: [PDF_PAGE 62 | score=2] Proficiencies and thorough investigation. Priests who are associated with the local government may be called upon to solve common crimes against the state, while other priests may be inquisi- tors or theological investigators. The DM may allow the PC to attempt a proficiency check when the player is missing an obvious line of inquiry or step of deductive reasoning, although this should be a rare use of this ability. An investigation proficiency check can also be used to discover clues at the scene of a crime or to extract information from a witness or suspect. Law: A character with this proficiency is thoroughly familiar with the legal system of his homeland and is skilled in representing ca
